scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: node ./scripts/ensure-android-java.mjs && npm run android:sync && ./android/gradlew -p android assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: node ./scripts/ensure-android-java.mjs && node ./scripts/ensure-android-signing.mjs && npm run android:sync && ./android/gradlew -p android assembleRelease
scripts.android:run: node ./scripts/ensure-android-java.mjs && npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
